biological_replicate: Three biological replicates of CDKL5 KO cells stably transfected with empty vector or CDKL5 KO cells stably expressing CDKL5 were lysed...
technical_replicate: TMT labelling allowed quantitative, multiplexed analysis of all six samples...
experimental_design: CDKL5 KO vs CDKL5 re-expressed comparison
which compared the total phosphoproteomes of CDKL5 knockout (KO) cells and CDKL5 KO cells in which CDKL5 was stably re‐expressed.
factor_value: CDKL5 knockout (KO) cells and CDKL5 KO cells in which CDKL5 was stably re‐expressed
number_of_fractions: fractionated by basic pH reversed‐phase chromatography into 40 fractions which were concatenated into 12 fractions
number_of_technical_replicates: TMT labelling allowed quantitative, multiplexed analysis of all six samples...
number_of_biological_replicates: Three biological replicates of CDKL5 KO cells...
number_of_samples: 3 biological replicates and 12 fractions imply 3 × 12 = 36 total samples.
